title: Vite Host
description: Browser host for standalone Studio — **Vite Host**. Does not load a project kernel; users supply an API base URL and optional token before the shared `@specd/ui` IDE mounts.
context: Browser host for standalone Studio — **Vite Host**. Does not load a project kernel; users supply an API base URL and optional token before the shared `@specd/ui` IDE mounts.

rules: `@specd/studio-web` MUST provide `dev`, `build`, and `preview` scripts that bundle the renderer importing `@specd/ui`.

rules.requirement: host does not bootstrap a Specd kernel
rules: The Vite host MUST NOT load `specd.yaml`, MUST NOT call `createKernel`, and MUST NOT start an API process — the API is started separately (e.g. `specd ui serve`).

rules.requirement: Vite receives API base from ui serve
rules: When `SPECD_API_BASE_URL` is set by `specd ui serve`, Vite MUST expose it to the renderer (e.g. `import.meta.env.VITE_SPECD_API_BASE_URL`) so `SpecdApp` auto-connects to the API origin. CORS for the UI origin is configured by the CLI (see `cli:serve-ui`), not via a dev proxy.

scenarios.name: dev script starts Vite dev server
when: pnpm dev runs in studio-web package

scenarios.name: preview script serves production build
then: AND no kernel bootstrap in process

scenarios.requirement: host does not bootstrap a Specd kernel
scenarios.name: Vite dev server has no Kernel import
then: AND API calls go to remote URL

scenarios.requirement: host does not bootstrap a Specd kernel
scenarios.name: Renderer uses SpecdDataPort remote adapter
then: AND no IPC bridge in web build

scenarios.requirement: host does not bootstrap a Specd kernel
scenarios.name: Missing API shows connect error not kernel crash
then: AND process does not throw kernel init error

scenarios.requirement: Vite receives API base from ui serve
scenarios.name: dev server uses injected API base URL
given: studio-web is launched via specd ui serve
when: the app boots in the browser
then: the connect default API URL matches the server-provided base
